questions.question: Besides Gilligan and the Skipper, name the five passengers on the TV show Gilligan's Island.
questions.answer: Thurston Howell III, Lovey Howell, Ginger, the Professor, Mary Ann

questions.question: What was the most famous weekly magazine for decades, primarily using photographs for Americans to view the world?
Recite the first two lines of the Troggs' 1966 version of "Wild Thing."
questions.answer: "Wild thing, you make my heart sing, you make everything groovy, wild thing."

questions.question: Name the company that GM provided with the new Scenicruiser bus in 1951, tailor-made for the enormous distances between U.S. cities.
Who famously encouraged the counterculture movement with the phrase, "Turn On, Tune In, Drop Out"?
